name: ncaa-companion-app
description: NCAA Football PC companion app - dynasty, roster, and progression tracking

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @ncaa/domain && npm run build -w @ncaa/parsers && npm run build -w @ncaa/storage && npm run build -w @ncaa/auth && npm run build -w @ncaa/sync && npm run build -w @ncaa/ui
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @ncaa/desktop && npm run build -w @ncaa/portal && npm run build -w @ncaa/api
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
